title: HR Analytics Dashboard System
title_cn: 人力资源分析看板系统
description: A NocoBase HR analytics dashboard for workforce structure, attrition, tenure, and organization health signals.
description_cn: NocoBase 人力资源分析看板，聚合员工结构、流失率、司龄和组织健康信号。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — HR Analytics Dashboard System: core HR metrics, org-structure charts, and an HR analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/39-hr-analytics.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 人力资源分析看板: 核心人力指标、组织结构图表和 HR 分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/39-hr-analytics.html
featureList:
Core HR metrics
Org-structure charts
An HR analysis report
about:
hr analytics dashboard
HR
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
